images.title: Fossil bones of Prolagus sardus, Corsica.jpg
images.description: Fossil bones of Prolagus sardus from the late Pleistocene of northern Corsica: (upper left) lower left jaw, (lower left) thighbone, (center left) upper incisor tooth, (right) upper jaw and skull in ventral view. Field of view ca. 10 cm wide.
